title: GitHub Issue Queue State
description: Schema for validating queue checkpoint state.

active_issue.description: The active GitHub issue number or identifier.

execution_lease_id.description: Unique identifier for the current execution session.

branch.description: The git branch associated with this queue state.

worktree.description: The local path to the isolated worktree for this session.

pr.description: The PR number or URL, if any.

status.description: The current status of the execution.

github_truth_summary.description: Snapshot of relevant GitHub API context to prevent stale continuations.
